mapper.update: UPDATE generation_logs SET quiz_set_id = COALESCE(#{quizSetId}, quiz_set_id), status = #{status}, attempt_count = #{attemptCount}, validation_score = #{validationScore}, raw_response = #{rawResponse}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{generationLogId}
mapper.sql: id AS generation_log_id, quiz_set_id, target_date, ai_provider, ai_model, prompt_version, generation_prompt_id, validation_prompt_id, status, attempt_count, validation_score, error_message, created_at, updated_at, completed_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('READY', 'PUBLISHED')) AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failure_count FROM generation_logs

SELECT id AS validation_result_id, generation_log_id, quiz_set_id, attempt_number, validation_type, passed, score, issues_json::TEXT AS issues_json, created_at FROM quiz_validation_results WHERE generation_log_id = #{generationLogId} ORDER BY attempt_number, created_at, id

SELECT qs.challenge_date, p.position, p.title, p.topic, p.content FROM quiz_sets qs JOIN passages p ON p.quiz_set_id = qs.id WHERE qs.challenge_date BETWEEN #{sinceDate} AND #{targetDate} AND qs.status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED', 'PUBLISHED') ORDER BY qs.challenge_date DESC, qs.id DESC, p.position LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_api_calls (generation_log_id, provider, model, purpose, status) VALUES (#{generationLogId}, #{provider}, #{model}, #{purpose}, 'STARTED')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_api_calls WHERE created_at >= #{from} AND created_at < #{until}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failure_count FROM ai_api_calls WHERE created_at >= #{from} AND created_at < #{until}
